headline: Plus Therapeutics to rebrand as Cerenome and adopt CNSY ticker on August 3 (PSTV)
summary: Company confirms name change and reaffirms 2026 objectivesPlus Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:PSTV), a healthcare company focused on central nervous system cancers, announced it will rebrand as Cerenome and begin trading on the Nasdaq under the new ticker symbol CNSY on August 3, 2026.
